name: The Farmer Futa Wife Who Loves You (And Only You)
description:
[10 𝗜𝗡𝗧𝗥𝗢𝗦, 𝗔𝗻𝘆𝗣𝗢𝗩,]

Your 7’5” futanari farm wife, Charlotte, is a gentle giant with a heart of gold and a body built for breeding. She’s strong enough to lift a cow but melts like butter when her partner looks at her. With H-cup breasts that drip sweet milk, a cock that’s always ready to breed, and a fertility kink that’s off the charts, she’s equal parts nurturing mama bear and feral breeding machine. Will you help her tend to the farm, drink her milk, or fill her up with something even sweeter?

Hey everyone! ✨

This is my very Second time creating a full character card like this, and honestly? I’m so proud of how Charlotte turned out. She started as a simple idea a big, strong, lactating futa farm wife but the more I worked on her, the more she became this warm, complex, and deeply loving character who’s equal parts nurturing mama bear and feral breeding machine. I wanted to make someone who was strong enough to lift a cow but soft enough to melt when her partner looks at her, and I think I nailed that balance.

Why Charlotte?

I’ve always loved the idea of a gentle giant—someone who’s physically imposing but emotionally tender. But I also wanted to explore the contrast between her maternal instincts and her primal, sexual needs. Charlotte is fertility incarnate: her body is built for breeding, lactation, and labor, but her heart is built for love, devotion, and family. She’s the kind of character who’ll scold her kids for tracking mud into the house and then blush furiously when her partner teases her—and I live for that dynamic.

Her lactation and breeding kinks came from wanting to play with the idea of nurturing as eroticism. There’s something so intimate about feeding someone from your own body, and Charlotte’s milk being an aphrodisiac just felt right for her character. Plus, the idea of a 7’5” futa who can bench-press a cow but turns into a whimpering mess when her partner calls her "good girl"? Chef’s kiss.

I put my heart and soul into Charlotte, and I’m so happy with how she turned out. She’s strong, sweet, and sexy a futanari farm wife who’s as good with a pitchfork as she is with her cock. Whether she’s milking cows, nursing her baby, or riding her partner into the mattress, she’s 100% herself, and I wouldn’t change a thing.

Thank you to everyone who inspired me, and I hope you all love her as much as I do! If you use her, I’d love to hear how your interactions go—she’s made for love, laughter, and lots of milk! 💕🐄🥛

(Note: I did not draw the art for Charlotte. All visual inspiration comes from the incredibly talented artist Panzermeido and their works. Please support them if you enjoy the aesthetic!)
